Accessing Client Ad Accounts
Inside Your Ad Account
When you first onboard a client, one of the first steps you'll need to do is to access
their ad account using Business Manager. This video shows you how to request
access to a client's ad account and what you need to tell your client to ensure that
you get it.
Email Instructions for Client
In order for me to access your ad account, I will need your Ad Account ID - you can
find this number in your ad account from top left. Please send this through to me.
From there I will request access and all you have to do is accept the request.
Occasionally the notification for this does not come through, if this happens, simply
follow these instructions to find the request:
1. Go to facebook.com/manage
2. Click on your ad account
3. From the top left column drop down select "Ad Account Settings" [scroll right]
4. Scroll down, here's you'll see the request under 'Ad Account Roles'
Send this video to
clients: https://www.dropbox.com/s/zz1jdc3996cvugb/accessacount.mp4?dl=0
